_comment: BioMate MCP server configuration. The canonical server is at backend/mcp/biomate_mcp_server.py (v1.1.0).
name: biomate
description: BioMate scientific workflow platform — 2,100+ bioinformatics pipelines via MCP

tools.name: chat
tools.description: Primary interface: natural-language → BioMate AI (workflow selection, param fill, execution)

tools.name: search_workflows
tools.description: Full-text search of 2,100+ workflow registry entries

tools.name: get_workflow_params
tools.description: Return typed parameter schema (nextflow_schema.json) for a workflow

tools.name: list_runs
tools.description: List recent workflow runs with status

tools.name: get_run_status
tools.description: Poll status of a running workflow execution

tools.name: get_output_files
tools.description: List output files from a completed run with download URLs

tools.name: upload_file
tools.description: Upload a local file to BioMate dataset store for workflow input

tools.name: research_query
tools.description: Search PubMed / Semantic Scholar and return synthesised answer with citations

tools.name: rerun_workflow
tools.description: Resume a failed run using Nextflow -resume (caches completed tasks)

auth.note: Generate at BioMate → Settings → API Keys, or copy JWT from browser dev-tools

BIOMATE_MCP_DEBUG.description: Set to 1 for verbose stderr logging
